_comment: Shared, NON-SECRET MCP server definitions — single source of truth for both Claude Code (~/.claude.json) and Claude Desktop. Secret env values (gitea/github/karakeep tokens) are injected at apply time from OpenBao by the merge scripts; outline is added per-app (http for Code, mcp-remote bridge for Desktop). signal is OS-specific (uv path + repo dir differ macOS vs Linux), so it is NOT listed here — the merge scripts inject the .signal entry from chezmoi template values. It's a thin JSON-RPC client for the signal-cli daemon (tcp 127.0.0.1:7583; LaunchAgent rocks.stump.signal-daemon on macOS, systemd --user signal-daemon on Linux). Edit here, then chezmoi apply.
